testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials from clients who have worked with us
testimonials.1.text: "Very satisfied with Uroo.dev's work. Our website is much more professional and faster. The process was transparent throughout."
testimonials.1.author: Rizky D. — Founder, TechStart
testimonials.2.text: "The inventory system Uroo.dev built transformed our operations. Real-time stock data and accurate reports. Highly recommended!"
testimonials.2.author: Aulia N. — Owner, Toko Makmur
testimonials.3.text: "The UI/UX design is modern and user-friendly. Our clients love the new dashboard analytics interface."
testimonials.3.author: Dimas S. — CTO, DataViz Corp
faq.title: Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How long does a project take?
faq.q1.answer: Timeline depends on complexity. A website takes 1-2 weeks, complex apps take 4-8 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline after consultation.
faq.q2.answer: Costs vary based on requirements. Landing pages start from $200, complex apps range from $1,000 to $5,000+. Contact us for a free consultation.
faq.q3.answer: Yes, we provide monthly plans covering bug fixes, backups, security updates, and performance monitoring.
faq.q4.answer: React, Node.js, Laravel, Astro, Tailwind CSS. MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB. We partner with trusted hosting providers.
faq.q5.answer: Reach out through our contact form or WhatsApp. We will schedule a free consultation with no obligation.
cta.title: Let's Collaborate
cta.description: Tell us about your project. Free consultation, no obligation.
footer.description: Modern software house helping businesses solve digital challenges through custom software.
about.title: Company
about.subtitle: A modern software house built for the digital age.
about.story1: Uroo.dev was founded with a simple mission: help businesses and startups solve their operational and digital challenges through custom software solutions that actually work.
about.story2: We believe that great software comes from understanding the problem first, then applying the right technology to solve it. Not the other way around.
about.story3: Every project starts with a question: "What problem are we solving?" The answer to that question guides everything we do.
about.mission: Deliver high-quality, scalable software that solves real business problems and drives measurable growth.
about.vision: Be the most trusted software partner for businesses across Southeast Asia.
about.founderDesc: With years of experience building digital products, Dimas founded Uroo.dev to help businesses leverage technology for growth. His approach combines technical excellence with a deep understanding of business needs.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Free consultation. No obligation. Just great conversation.
contact.formDesc: Fill in the form and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
